title: CurPos Function
description:
CurPos Function

CurPos Function

See_Also Example

Returns the current target position of the robot.
see_also:
FindPos

InPos

RealPos

CurPos Function Example

Function main

Xqt showPosition

		  Do

		    Jump P0

		    Jump P1

		  Loop

		Fend

Function showPosition

Do

		    P99 = CurPos

Print CX(P99), CY(P99)

		  Loop

		Fend
